lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have another Rada's blessing?

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: Not unless you free up some space.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: I'm Elise, the taskmaster for the Kourend & Kebos Achievement Diary.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is the Achievement Diary?

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: It's a diary that helps you keep track of particular achievements. In Great Kourend and the Kebos Lowlands, it can help you discover some quite useful things.

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: Eventually, with enough exploration, you'll be rewarded.

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: You can see the list of tasks on the side-panel.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a question about my Achievement Diary.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is the Achievement Diary?

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: It's a diary that helps you keep track of particular achievements. In Great Kourend and the Kebos Lowlands, it can help you discover some quite useful things.

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: Eventually, with enough exploration, you'll be rewarded.

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: You can see the list of tasks on the side-panel.

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: Well, there are four different blessings, which match up with the four levels of difficulty. Each has the same rewards as the previous level and some additional benefits too...

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: which tier of rewards would you like to know more about?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Easy rewards please.

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: If you complete all of the easy tasks, you'll get a 2% chance of catching two fish at once while using the blessing. It will also provide 3 daily teleports to the Kourend Woodland. On top of that, you'll be able to

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: access Crabclaw Island for half the price, lizardmen will be more likely to drop a Xeric's talisman,, the people of Hosidius will protect your farming patches for free, you'll be able to use the Hosidius Kitchens and Eodan

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: in the Forthos Dungeon will now tan hide for you at 8 times the normal price down from 10 times.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: In addition to the easy rewards, you'll get a 4% chance of catching two fish at once while using the blessing. It will also provide 5 daily teleports to the Kourend Woodland. On top of that, you'll have a 5% chance to

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: mine two dense essence blocks at once, Thirus will give you 20 free Dynamite per day and Eodan in the Forthos Dungeon will now tan hide for you at 6 times the normal price down from 8 times.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Hard rewards please.

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: In addition to the easy and medium benefits, you'll get a 6% chance of catching two fish at once while using the blessing. It will also provide unlimited teleports to the Kourend Woodland and 3 daily teleports to Mount

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: Karuulm. On top of that, Captain Cleive will show you how to use a Slayer helmet in place of a Shayzien helm, you'll get a 5% increase in yield from the Hosidius and Farming Guild Herb patches, Thirus will give you 40

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: free Dynamite per day and Eodan in the Forthos Dungeon will now tan hide for you at 4 times the normal price down from 6 times. Tyss at the Dark Altar will give you an ash sanctifier too!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Elite rewards please.

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: In addition to the previous tiers of rewards, you'll get an 8% chance of catching two fish at once while using the blessing. It will also provide unlimited teleports to the Kourend Woodland and to Mount Karuulm. On top of

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: that, Konar quo Maten will give you 20 Slayer Points per task rather than 18, you'll be 10% less likely to burn food at the Hosidius City Kitchens, you'll get 10% more Blood runes when Runecrafting, you'll no longer

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: need to wear heat protection inside of the Karuulm Slayer Dungeon, Thirus will give you 80 free Dynamite per day, Eodan in the Forthos Dungeon will now tan hide for you at 2 times the normal price down

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: from 4 times and the experience provided by the ash sanctifier is increased too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I claim the rewards?

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: Just complete the tasks in Kourend & Kebos area so they're ticked off, then come and speak to me for your rewards.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: See you later.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the easy tasks in my Kourend & Kebos Achievement Diary!

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You'll be wanting your reward then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: This blessing is a symbol of your exploration of Great Kourend and the Kebos Lowlands. You now have a 2% chance of catching two fish at once while using the blessing. It also provides 3 daily teleports to the

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: Kourend Woodland. On top of that, you can access Crabclaw Island for half the price, lizardmen are more likely to drop a Xeric's talisman, the people of Hosidius will protect your farming patches for free, you'll be able

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: to use the Hosidius Kitchens and Eodan in the Forthos Dungeon will now tan hide for you at 8 times the normal price down from 10 times.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: If you ever lose your blessing, come back to me to reclaim it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the medium tasks in my Kourend & Kebos Achievement Diary!

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: You need to complete all of the easy tasks too before I can reward you for the more difficult sets.

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You'll be wanting your reward then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: I've upgraded your Rada's blessing for you. You now have a 4% chance of catching two fish at once while using the blessing. It also provides 5 daily teleports to the Kourend Woodland. On top of that, you'll have a

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: 5% chance to mine two dense essence blocks at once, Thirus will give you 20 free Dynamite per day and Eodan in the Forthos Dungeon will now tan hide for you at 6 times the normal price down from 8 times.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the hard tasks in my Kourend & Kebos Achievement Diary!

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: You need to complete all of the easy and medium tasks too before I can reward you for the more difficult sets.

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You'll be wanting your reward then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: I've upgraded your Rada's blessing for you. You now have a 6% chance of catching two fish at once while using the blessing. It also provides unlimited teleports to the Kourend Woodland and 3 daily teleports to Mount

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: Karuulm. On top of that, Captain Cleive will show you how to use a Slayer helmet in place of a Shayzien helm, you'll get a 5% increase in yield from the Hosidius and Farming Guild Herb patches, Thirus will give you 40

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: free Dynamite per day, Eodan in the Forthos Dungeon will now tan hide for you at 4 times the normal price down from 6 times and Tyss at the Dark Altar will give you an ash sanctifier too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the elite tasks in my Kourend & Kebos Achievement Diary!

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: You need to complete all of the easy, medium and hard tasks too before I can reward you for the elite task set.

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You've completed all of the tasks in the Kourend & Kebos area! Here's your reward!

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: I've upgraded your Rada's blessing for you. You now have an 8% chance of catching two fish at once while using the blessing. It also provides unlimited teleports to the Kourend Woodland and to Mount Karuulm. On

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: top of that, Konar quo Maten will give you 20 Slayer Points per task rather than 18, you'll be 10% less likely to burn food at the Hosidius City Kitchens, you'll get 10% more Blood runes when Runecrafting, you'll no

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: longer need to wear heat protection inside the Karuulm Slayer Dungeon, Thirus will give you 80 free Dynamite per day, Eodan in the Forthos Dungeon will now tan hide for you at 2 times the normal price down

lines.speaker: Elise
lines.text: from 4 times and the experience provided by the ash sanctifier is increased too, and finally you'll be more likely to gain higher tiered ores from Blast Mining.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!
